title.rendered: Get A Break For Spring Break!

content.rendered:
Need a break this Spring Break?
Pack your bags, Book early and save!


Look for Helijet’s new, low 14-day advance booking fares.

From March 14 to April 6, 2026 the Easter Bunny is loading his basket with some great one-way fares!   Fly between Victoria Harbour & Downtown Vancouver Harbour from $173* or Nanaimo Harbour & Downtown Vancouver Harbour from $103*.
(*one-way adult fare including tax & fees, based on availability)

If the spectacular views flying over the Salish Sea aren’t enough, all Helijet fares offer the same great service and added amenities you expect from British Columbia’s only scheduled helicopter airline!

  • Earn 250 Aeroplan Points On All One-Way Fares
  • Twin-Engine, Instrument Flight Rules (IFR) Capable 12-Passenger Sikorsky S76 Helicopters Operated by Two Pilots
  • Free Parking at Vancouver Harbour, Victoria Harbour & Nanaimo Harbour Terminals (2 days parking included with fares)
  • Fast Check-In: Arrive Minimum 20 Minutes Prior to Departure
  • Generous Baggage Allowance: Two Pieces Up to 50 lbs/ 22.6kgs
  • Comfortable VIP Lounges
  • Complimentary Grab & Go Snacks, Local Beer & Wine, Nespresso Coffee & more
  • Courtesy Drop-Off Shuttle Vans Upon Arrival at Your Destination

Click To Start Your Spring Break Now!
